'''''Vo''''' was a [[Container transport]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. ''Vo'' was part of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'''s]] [[Corrupter repair convoy|vital resupply convoy]] lead by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']] in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. ''Vo'' was ferrying a fresh supply of Imperial [[Probe droid/Legends|Probe droids]]. The ship was then attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders in the [[Battle of Bettel]] and was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
